name: Islamic Hubb Institute
tagline: Illuminating Hearts Through Authentic Islamic Education
description: Islamic Hubb Institute is a premier institution dedicated to providing authentic Islamic education rooted in the Quran and Sunnah. We offer comprehensive programs in Quranic studies, Arabic language, Islamic jurisprudence, and spiritual development.
mission: To nurture knowledgeable Muslims who embody the teachings of Islam and contribute positively to society through faith-based education and character development.
vision: To be a leading global center for Islamic education that produces scholars and leaders who serve humanity with wisdom and compassion.

values.title: Authenticity
values.description: Teaching based on authentic sources: the Quran and authentic Sunnah

values.title: Excellence
values.description: Striving for the highest standards in education and character

values.title: Accessibility
values.description: Making quality Islamic education available to all seekers of knowledge

values.title: Community
values.description: Building a supportive learning community united in faith
